Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0A30 "PCFUZZ-0785-0A30" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0785 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "PC Fuzz.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0785 to copy 87 bytes of code (essentially a jump table) to $0200 before starting the game to allow it to run properly.
